name: dolly-devcontainer
postCreateCommand: /bin/bash -lc "sudo mkdir -p /home/vscode/.gradle && sudo chown -R vscode:vscode /home/vscode/.gradle && sed -i 's/\r$//' ./gradlew && chmod +x ./gradlew && ./gradlew --version && ./gradlew help"
postAttachCommand: /bin/bash -lc "echo 'Monorepo mode: run tasks like ./gradlew :dolly-backend:build. For a prod-like backend run, use scripts in ./.devcontainer. To try prod base image, set build.args.BASE_IMAGE to europe-north1-docker.pkg.dev/cgr-nav/pull-through/nav.no/jre:openjdk-21 and rebuild.'"
